title: Add register command (POST /register)
description: Add a specter register command for creating new users. Flags: --email, --username, --invite-code. Calls POST /register (no auth required). On success, display the token and generated invite codes.

title: Add me command (GET /me)
description: Add a specter me command to show current user info. Calls GET /me with auth. Display id, email, username, and invite codes (with redeemed status).
